name: Ariel, Priestess of the Nekroz
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>影霊衣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ネクロス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>巫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> エリアル
name_jp_tl_base: Erial, Priestess of the Shadow Spirit Cloth
desc: Once per turn: You can reveal a number of "Nekroz" cards in your hand; increase or decrease this card's Level by the number revealed, until the end of this turn. If this card is Tributed by card effect: You can add 1 "Nekroz" monster from your Deck to your hand, except a Ritual Monster. You can only use this effect of "Ariel, Priestess of the Nekroz" once per turn.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can reveal a number of "Nekroz" cards in your hand; increase or decrease this card's Level by the number revealed, until the end of this turn.
